reviews.review_description: I don't know what's going on if this made by the same person that made rally racing extreme but if you are the same person that made that game y'all use the same levels that you have used on that game that is diabolical if you're not the same person you need to play that game and see that I use exact same levels as rally race an extreme levels and that really sucks I would love to have a refund this game is not what I thought it was I thought going to be a brand new truck experience but is not the level sucks it's making the levels on this game with the truck making really extreme look bad I thought going into it's going to be different then you're offer the same thing gloves unlock all the trucks at the same thing as rarely extreme and that's not fair for the price you charging this for it's like a same game as red extreme except you just do trucks on it and it's drive slow in the levels are shorter very boring such disappointing it sounded so promising The screenshots looked at the jet when I saw the night turn driving but I wouldn't expect him to be the same as rather extreme if you have not play that game you need to play it and you'll see exactly what I'm talking about same levels only thing different is the truck you driving a truck and his car is on the other side passing by either that this game sucks so disappointing and we ever going to get a good trucking game that actually work fights truck simulator Euro simulator I would love a refund if I can get one back waste of money gave me a headache made me motion sickness give me a migraine headache The graphics are bad
